channel.title: EDGAR Live Scanner
channel.description: High-signal SEC EDGAR filings — tender offers, going-private, activist stakes, spinoffs, delistings, busted deals.

item.title: 🎯 Tender · LPRO
item.ns0:headline: Facing $3.15/share cash tender offer; 3 lawsuits seek to enjoin
item.description:
Facing $3.15/share cash tender offer; 3 lawsuits seek to enjoin

Is the target of a $3.15 per share all-cash tender offer by ANV Group Holdings Ltd. Three stockholder lawsuits have been filed alleging misleading disclosures in the Schedule 14D-9, seeking to enjoin the transaction. The tender offer remains pending.

About: Open Lending Corporation provides lending enablement and risk analytics solutions to credit unions, regional banks, finance companies, and captive finance companies of automakers in the United States. The company offers lenders protection platform (LPP), which is a cloud-based automotive lending enablement platform that provides loan analytics solutions and automated issuance of credit default insurance with third-party insurance providers.

  • Counterparty: ANV Group Holdings Ltd.
  • Offer price: $3.15
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-06-29
  • Next catalyst: Court decisions on injunctive relief; tender offer expiration

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · WTG
item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Wintergreen SPAC in $80M stock merger; vote pending
item.description:
Acquired by Wintergreen SPAC in $80M stock merger; vote pending

Will be acquired by Wintergreen Acquisition Corp. in a reverse merger. KIKA shareholders will receive Wintergreen ordinary shares valued at $80 million (the KIKA valuation). The merger agreement was signed November 17, 2025, and requires approval from Wintergreen's shareholders at an extraordinary general meeting.

About: Wintergreen Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was incorporated in 2024 is headquartered in Tongzhou, the People's Republic of China.

  • Counterparty: Wintergreen Acquisition Corp.
  • Deal value: $80,000,000
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2025-11-17
  • Next catalyst: Wintergreen shareholder vote on business combination

item.title: 📤 Divestiture · IEP
item.ns0:headline: Sells Pep Boys to Mavis for $700M cash; retains real estate, AAMCO
item.description:
Sells Pep Boys to Mavis for $700M cash; retains real estate, AAMCO

Agreed to sell its Pep Boys automotive service subsidiary to Mavis Tire Supply for $700M in cash, subject to customary purchase price adjustments. IEP will retain the owned real estate previously transferred from Pep Boys, as well as the AAMCO Transmissions and Precision Tune Auto Care businesses. The transaction is expected to close in the coming months, with a $21M reverse termination fee payable by Mavis in certain circumstances.

About: Icahn Enterprises L.P., through its subsidiaries engages in the investment, energy, automotive, food packaging, real estate, home fashion and pharma in the United States and internationally. The Investment segment invests its proprietary capital through various private investment funds; and it provides investment advisory, administrative, and back-office services to the investment funds.

  • Counterparty: Mavis Tire Supply LLC
  • Deal value: $700 million
  • Consideration: cash

  • Next catalyst: customary closing conditions

item.title: 🔎 Strategic Review · Formal Alternatives · CVKD
item.ns0:headline: Launches structured partnering process for cardiac critical care assets
item.description:
Launches structured partnering process for cardiac critical care assets

Initiated a structured process to secure strategic out-licensing, portfolio monetization, or commercial co-development partnerships for its late-stage cardiac acute critical care assets (CAD-1005, frunexian, tecarfarin). The company recently presented Phase 2 CAD-1005 data showing >25% absolute reduction in thrombotic events. The process aims to maximize asset value through partnerships with global industry leaders.

About: Cadrenal Therapeutics, Inc. operates as a late-stage biopharmaceutical company that develops novel therapies for life-threatening immune and thrombotic conditions. The company is developing Tecarfarin, an oral vitamin K antagonist that is in Phase 3 clinical trial designed to prevent heart attacks, strokes, and deaths due to blood clots in patients requiring chronic anticoagulation, such as patients with left ventricular assist devices, end-stage kidney disease, and atrial fibrillation; CAD-1005…

item.title: 🔐 Going Private · UTZ
item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Intersnack for $14.25/share cash; 91% premium; $2.9B EV
item.description:
Acquired by Intersnack for $14.25/share cash; 91% premium; $2.9B EV

Has entered into a definitive agreement to be acquired by Intersnack Group and the Rice and Lissette Family for $14.25 per share in cash, representing a 91% premium over the July 20 closing price and an enterprise value of approximately $2.9 billion. The transaction is expected to close in the fourth quarter of 2026, subject to stockholder and regulatory approvals. A special committee of independent directors unanimously recommended the deal, and a fairness opinion was obtained.

About: Utz Brands, Inc. manufactures branded salty snacks in the United States. The company provides a range of salty snack food products, such as potato chips, tortilla chips, pretzels, cheese snacks, pub and party mixes, pork skins, and ready-to-eat popcorn, as well as other snacks which include salsa and dips; and non-branded and non-salty snacks comprising partner brands, private label, and co-manufacturing products.

  • Counterparty: Intersnack Group
  • Offer price: $14.25
  • Deal value: $2.9 billion
  • Premium: 91%
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-07-21
  • Expected Close: Q4 2026
  • Next catalyst: Stockholder vote; regulatory approvals

Px $14.09 · Mkt cap $659.6M · EV $2.25B · Fwd P/E 10.4x · Fwd EV/EBITDA 9.9x · Consumer Staples / Food Products

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · VYNE
item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Yarrow Bioscience; 1:50 reverse split; special dividend; close July 27
item.description:
Acquired by Yarrow Bioscience; 1:50 reverse split; special dividend; close July 27

Announced a 1-for-50 reverse stock split and provided an update on the special dividend in connection with its pending merger with Yarrow Bioscience. The reverse split is expected to be effective prior to the merger closing, which is expected on July 27, 2026, with the combined company trading as YARW. Stockholders approved the merger on July 16, 2026.

About: VYNE Therapeutics Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on developing therapies to treat chronic inflammatory and immune-mediated conditions. The company’s lead program is repibresib gel (VYN201), a topically administered small molecule pan-bromodomain and extra-terminal (BET) inhibitor soft drug to address diseases involving multiple and diverse inflammatory cell signaling pathways with low systemic exposure.

  • Counterparty: Yarrow Bioscience, Inc.
  • Consideration: empty
  • Announced: 2025-12-17
  • Expected Close: 2026-07-27
  • Next catalyst: Merger closing expected July 27, 2026

item.title: 🔐 Going Private · Definitive · UTZ
item.ns0:headline: Acquired by Intersnack Group for $14.25/share cash; 91% premium; close Q4 2026
item.description:
Acquired by Intersnack Group for $14.25/share cash; 91% premium; close Q4 2026

Entered into a definitive agreement to be acquired by Intersnack Group for $14.25 per share in cash, representing a ~91% premium to the July 20 closing price and an enterprise value of ~$2.9B. The transaction is expected to close in Q4 2026, subject to stockholder and regulatory approvals. The Rice and Lissette Family, holding ~42% of shares, have committed to vote in favor. After close, Utz will be privately held 50/50 by the family and Intersnack.

About: Utz Brands, Inc. manufactures branded salty snacks in the United States. The company provides a range of salty snack food products, such as potato chips, tortilla chips, pretzels, cheese snacks, pub and party mixes, pork skins, and ready-to-eat popcorn, as well as other snacks which include salsa and dips; and non-branded and non-salty snacks comprising partner brands, private label, and co-manufacturing products.

  • Counterparty: Intersnack Group GmbH & Co. KG
  • Offer price: $14.25
  • Deal value: ~$2.9B enterprise value
  • Premium: 91%
  • Consideration: cash
  • Announced: 2026-07-21
  • Expected Close: Q4 2026
  • Next catalyst: Stockholder vote on merger

Px $14.09 · Mkt cap $659.6M · EV $2.25B · Fwd P/E 10.4x · Fwd EV/EBITDA 9.9x · Consumer Staples / Food Products

item.description:
Sells Bearing Insurance Group; $32.3M pre-tax gain

Completed the sale of its equity interest in Bearing Insurance Group to an unaffiliated third party, effective May 1, 2026, resulting in a pre-tax gain of approximately $32.3 million in Q2 2026. The company also authorized a $250 million share repurchase program through May 2027. The divestiture reflects a strategic focus on core banking operations.

About: Atlantic Union Bankshares Corporation operates as the bank holding company for Atlantic Union Bank that provides banking and related financial products and services to consumers and businesses in the United States. The company operates in two segments, Wholesale Banking and Consumer Banking. It accepts various deposit products, including checking, savings, time deposit, and money market accounts; certificates of deposit; and other depository services.

item.ns0:headline: Faces proxy contest from Octagon; vote FOR King Street sub-adviser
item.description:
Faces proxy contest from Octagon; vote FOR King Street sub-adviser

Faces a proxy contest from terminated sub-adviser Octagon over the board's decision to replace Octagon with King Street Capital Management's Rockford Tower division. The board terminated Octagon for underperformance, citing a 54.40% NAV decline since inception and persistent benchmark underperformance. Shareholders are asked to vote FOR the new sub-adviser on the white proxy card; a vote against will not reinstate Octagon.

  • Next catalyst: Special meeting vote pending

item.title: 🎯 Tender · LSTA
item.ns0:headline: Tender offer expired; buyer fails to fund; evaluating remedies
item.description:
Tender offer expired; buyer fails to fund; evaluating remedies

The tender offer by Kuva Acquisition Corp. (subsidiary of Kuva Labs Inc.) for Lisata Therapeutics expired on July 20, 2026, with 66.8% of shares tendered, satisfying the minimum condition. However, Parent has been unable to obtain sufficient financing, and Purchaser has not accepted for payment. The company is evaluating its rights and remedies, including potential legal action.

About: Lisata Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company, engages in the discovery, development, and commercialization of therapies for the treatment of solid tumors and other diseases. Its investigational product is certepetide, which is in Phase 2 clinical studies for the treatment of solid tumors, such as metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma, cholangiocarcinoma, appendiceal cancer, and colon cancer and glioblastoma multiforme in combination with range of anti-cancer regimens.…

  • Counterparty: Kuva Labs Inc. (via Kuva Acquisition Corp.)
  • Offer price: $4.00 per share + up to $3.00 per CVR
  • Consideration: cash

  • Next catalyst: Company's evaluation of remedies; potential litigation or renegotiation

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · EC
item.ns0:headline: Resumes tender offer for 25% of Brava Energia; auction Aug 5
item.description:
Resumes tender offer for 25% of Brava Energia; auction Aug 5

Ecopetrol's Brazilian subsidiary resumed the voluntary tender offer (OPAV) to acquire 116,110,717 common shares of Brava Energia S.A., representing approximately 25% of its share capital. The OPAV is open until August 5, 2026, when the auction will take place. The transaction is subject to regulatory approvals and conditions precedent.

About: Ecopetrol S.A. operates as an integrated energy company. It operates through four segments: Exploration and Production; Transport and Logistics; Refining and Petrochemicals; and Energy transmission and Toll Roads Concessions. The Exploration and Production segment engages in the exploration and production of oil and gas. The Transport and Logistics segment is involved in the transportation of crude oil, motor fuels, fuel oil, and other refined products, including diesel, jet, and biofuels.

  • Counterparty: Brava Energia S.A.
  • Stake: 25%
  • Announced: 2026-07-20

item.description:
Spins off cloud and power infrastructure segment; 65-75% growth, early 2027

Plans to spin off its cloud and power infrastructure (CPI) segment into a new publicly traded company. The CPI segment generated $6.6B in revenue last year and is expected to grow 65-75% this year and 80% next year. The spin-off is expected to close early next calendar year; the CEO will lead the Spinco, and the name will be announced in September.

About: Flex Ltd. provides technology innovation, supply chain, and manufacturing solutions to data center, communications, enterprise, consumer, automotive, healthcare, industrial, and power industries in the Americas, Asia, and Europe. The company operates through three segments: Integrated Technology Solutions (ITS), Regulated Manufacturing Solutions (RMS), and Cloud and Power Infrastructure (CPI).

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Preliminary · APHD
item.ns0:headline: Signs LOI to acquire Rod & Hammer whiskey brand; close Q4 2026
item.description:
Signs LOI to acquire Rod & Hammer whiskey brand; close Q4 2026

Apogee 21 Holdings signed a letter of intent to acquire Rod & Hammer, the largest craft distillery on California's Central Coast, including the brand and related assets. The transaction is expected to close in the fourth quarter of 2026, subject to definitive agreements, due diligence, and financing. This follows Apogee's acquisition of Noble Oak in March 2026, expanding its premium American whiskey portfolio.

About: Apogee 21 Holdings, Inc. doing business as A21 Wine & Spirits, produces and markets craft spirits and wine. The company owns Monkey in Paradise Vodka, Andale Tequila, and Blue Nectar Tequila brands. The company also has the sales agency for Zunte Mezcal, and Finca Ferrer Wines from Argentina. The company was formerly known as 30DC, Inc. and changed its name to Apogee 21 Holdings, Inc. in August 2022. Apogee 21 Holdings, Inc. was founded in 2005 and is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.

  • Counterparty: Rod & Hammer
  • Announced: 2026-07-19
  • Expected Close: Q4 2026
  • Next catalyst: Execution of definitive agreement and completion of financing

item.description:
Nominates 4 directors at Phunware; seeks board refreshment

Goldenwise Capital Group disclosed a 6.9% stake in Phunware and sent an open letter to the board proposing four director candidates: Shawn Kravetz, Richard Ding, Mona Zhang, and Steve Han. The activist criticizes governance, capital allocation, and board compensation, and seeks to expand the board by at least three new directors. The board has not engaged constructively.

It operates through two segments: software subscriptions and services and advertising.

item.title: 🪙 Debt Restr. · GAUZ
item.ns0:headline: Proposes debt settlement under Israeli Insolvency Law; $7M PIPE led by CEO
item.description:
Proposes debt settlement under Israeli Insolvency Law; $7M PIPE led by CEO

Proposed a debt settlement under Sections 322–348 of the Israeli Insolvency Law to repay all creditors in full via two tracks: (a) upon an exit event exceeding $330M, or (b) 25% of annual net profit until repaid. In connection, the company entered a binding term sheet for a $7M PIPE led by CEO Eyal Peso and Chutzpah Holdings LP, conditioned on creditor approval and court confirmation. The settlement requires a double majority of creditors and court confirmation; no definitive agreement has been executed.

About: Gauzy Ltd., an integrated light and vision control company, develops, manufactures, and supplies vision and light control technologies in Israel, the United States, France, rest of Europe, Asia, and internationally. It operates through four segments: Architecture, Automotive, Safety tech, and Aeronautics.

  • Announced: 2026-07-20

  • Next catalyst: Creditor vote and court confirmation

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · BNS
item.ns0:headline: Acquires Maple Financial Holdings for stock consideration; Maple shareholder vote required
item.description:
Acquires Maple Financial Holdings for stock consideration; Maple shareholder vote required

The Bank of Nova Scotia (BNS) is acquiring Maple Financial Holdings, Inc. via a merger of its wholly owned subsidiary with Maple. Each Maple share will be converted into a number of BNS common shares based on a formula: $25 million plus Maple's adjusted tangible equity capital divided by the number of fully diluted Maple shares, then divided by the 10-day VWAP of BNS shares. The merger was announced on May 28, 2026, and requires approval by two-thirds of Maple voting common and preferred shareholders voting as separate classes. BNS is not soliciting proxies; this F-4 registers the BNS shares to be issued.

About: The Bank of Nova Scotia provides various banking products and services in Canada, the United States, Mexico, Peru, Chile, Colombia, the Caribbean and Central America, and internationally. It operates through Canadian Banking, International Banking, Global Wealth Management, and Global Banking and Markets segments.

  • Counterparty: Maple Financial Holdings, Inc.
  • Consideration: stock
  • Announced: 2026-05-28
  • Next catalyst: Maple shareholder vote

item.ns0:headline: FDA approves subcutaneous Sarclisa Escena for multiple myeloma
item.description:
FDA approves subcutaneous Sarclisa Escena for multiple myeloma

The FDA approved Sanofi's subcutaneous Sarclisa Escena (isatuximab-irfc) for multiple myeloma across all existing indications of the IV formulation. It is the first anticancer treatment administered via an on-body injector. Approval based on IRAKLIA phase 3 study demonstrating non-inferior efficacy and safety vs IV infusion.

About: Sanofi engages in the research, development, manufacture, and marketing of therapeutic solutions. It provides immunology and inflammation, rare diseases neurology, oncology, and other vaccines. It also offers poliomyelitis, pertussis, and haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) pediatric vaccines; respiratory syncytial virus protection and hexavalent combination vaccines that includes hepatitis A, typhoid, yellow fever, and rabies vaccines.

item.description:
Acquires Avenzo Therapeutics for $300M stock; combined co to trade as AVZO

Will acquire Avenzo Therapeutics in a stock-for-stock reverse merger, with Avenzo valued at $300M and Rallybio at $15M. Pre-merger Rallybio stockholders will own ~2.8% of the combined company, Avenzo stockholders ~56.6%, and concurrent financing investors ~40.6% (the financing adds $215M in cash). The combined company will be renamed Avenzo Therapeutics and trade under AVZO; the merger is subject to stockholder approval, a reverse stock split, and other conditions.

About: Rallybio Corporation, a clinical-stage biotechnology company, engages in the development and commercialization of life-transforming therapies for patients suffering from severe and rare diseases. Its lead product candidate is the RLYB116, an inhibitor of complement component 5 (C5) to treat several diseases of complement dysregulation which has completed phase 1 trial; and RLYB332, a preclinical antibody, for the treatment of severe anemia with ineffective erythropoiesis and iron overload.

The affiliate will acquire substantially all of Senti's business, and Senti stockholders will receive contingent value rights (CVRs) with potential cash payments up to $60M tied to milestones for SENTI-202. The transaction is subject to stockholder approval and other customary conditions, with closing expected in Q3 2026.

About: Senti Biosciences Holdings, Inc., a clinical stage biotechnology company, develops cell and gene therapies engineered with its gene circuit platform technologies for patients living with incurable diseases. The company’s lead product candidates utilize off-the-shelf healthy adult donor derived natural killer (NK) cells to create CAR-NK cells outfitted with gene circuit technologies in various oncology indications with unmet need.

  • Counterparty: Celadon Partners affiliate
  • Deal value: up to $60M
  • Announced: 2026-07-14
  • Expected Close: Q3 2026
  • Next catalyst: Stockholder vote; proxy filing within 30 business days

item.description:

FDA approved REVTORPYK (gedatolisib) for HR+/HER2-, PIK3CA wild-type locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer after prior endocrine therapy. Phase 3 VIKTORIA-1 trial showed 76% and 67% reduction in risk of progression or death with REVTORPYK combinations vs fulvestrant. Celcuity plans commercial launch in late Q3 2026 and will submit an sNDA for the PIK3CA mutant cohort in Q3 2026.

In connection with the vote, the company entered into non-redemption agreements covering 1.65M shares, and 21.2M public shares were redeemed at ~$10.83 per share for ~$229.9M, leaving only 1.77M public shares outstanding. The extension provides additional time to complete a business combination.

item.ns0:headline: Acquired by USFM for 10% of post-merger stock; CVRs for legacy assets
item.description:
Acquired by USFM for 10% of post-merger stock; CVRs for legacy assets

Co. entered into a definitive merger agreement with USFM Corporation, under which USFM Merger Sub will merge into Twin Vee, with Twin Vee surviving as a wholly-owned subsidiary of USFM. Twin Vee shareholders will receive a pro rata portion of 10% of USFM's outstanding shares post-merger. Prior to closing, Twin Vee's existing assets and liabilities will be contributed to a trust and distributed as contingent value rights (CVRs) to current shareholders. The merger requires stockholder approval from both companies and other customary conditions, with a termination fee of $1.5M payable by Twin Vee under certain circumstances.

About: Twin Vee Powercats Co. designs, manufactures, and markets recreational and commercial power boats. The company offers catamaran boats, dual hull vessels, and Bahama Boat Works under the Twin Vee brand; and V-hull boats under the AquaSport brand for use in recreational activities, including fishing, diving and water-skiing, as well as commercial activities, such as transportation, eco tours, fishing, and diving expeditions.

item.title: 🤝 Merger · Definitive · RDZN
item.ns0:headline: Acquires Riverside for up to £12M; 50% cash at close, 50% earn-out
item.description:
Acquires Riverside for up to £12M; 50% cash at close, 50% earn-out

Through its 92%-owned India subsidiary, signed a definitive agreement to acquire Riverside International Holdings Ltd, a European MGA specializing in short-term car rental insurance. Total consideration is up to £12 million (~$15 million), with £6 million payable at closing and £6 million in a three-year earn-out tied to performance milestones. Sellers may elect cash or equity in Roadzen India (valued at ~$280M). The target generates ~$18-20M revenue and ~$1.6-2M EBITDA. Closing is subject to regulatory approvals and other conditions, with a long-stop date of July 3, 2027.

About: Roadzen, Inc. operates an Insurtech company in India, the United States, the United Kingdom, and Europe. The company offers underwriting solutions for cars, drivers and fleets, road safety using app-based, and computer vision-based telematics, such as accident prevention, distraction alerts, and driver coaching, as well as claims management comprising accident scene management, first notice of loss (FNOL), touchless video loss adjustment, and roadside assistance (RSA).

  • Counterparty: Riverside International Holdings Ltd
  • Deal value: £12 million (~$15 million)
  • Consideration: cash+stock
  • Announced: 2026-07-03
  • Expected Close: by July 3, 2027
  • Next catalyst: regulatory approvals and closing conditions
